title: New Year’s Eve
content:
New Year’s Eve
Alone
McDonald’s accompanies a number two meal (two smaller burgers), no pickles
Apron wrapped round over waste
Decade<nce>
New Year’s Eve
Alone [relationship]
Corinth accompanies Afghani heroin, vodka
Killing time
Lie & Truth asynchronous

“I was drunk
When you
left me
for Christ’s Mass.

“I am not doing heroin. I’d tell you if I was
